name: verdict
description: Verdict — AI 诉讼操作系统，通过模拟对方律师、法官和己方律师的完整博弈过程，在起诉、应诉、庭审和和解之前把案件打一遍。内嵌接案评估（事实中性化阀门）、中立法律检索（MCP 增强 + 请求权基础预选）、比例原则攻防、合同审查、法条引用审计、和解分析、上诉分析、法律文书生成能力。支持 7 法域（中国大陆/美国/日本/韩国/欧洲/东南亚/中东）。
author: Qomob团队
based_on: Red Team Lawyer v1.0 (诉讼攻防推演.md)
embedded_capabilities: legal-research (stage 0, neutral, MCP-verified citations, claim-basis-prescreen for civil-law jurisdictions, aggressive-mcp-degradation)
case-type-aware-evidence-scoring (stage 4, dynamic weights by legal_domain, admissibility-as-post-filter)
strategy-decision-gate (between stage 4-5, enforce strategy decision contract)
compact-strategy (explicit field-preservation rules for downstream context compression)
